Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand the events and how they might relate to each other Lets list out the events again and see if I can spot patterns

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The key is to match events that belong to the same patient based on age gender and the flow of activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There are three registration events here Event 1 45M ER private Event 2 62F ER public Event 3 28M Surgery private So these are three separate patients Each registration should be the start of a case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then the following events should be linked to these registrations based on matching patient age and patient gender and the logical sequence of activities

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First Case 1 Event 1 45M ER Lets look for events that have patient age 45 and gender M and are in departments that follow ER The next event for this patient would be initial triage event 4 which matches Then after triage they might go for X ray event 7 which is in Radiology Then later a doctor consultation event 12 in ER diagnosis of hairline fracture Then discharged event 15 So thats a possible flow

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Event 2 62F ER Then initial triage event 5 Then lab test requested event 8 Then lab test completed event 10 Then doctor consultation event 11 leading to diagnosis and prescription event 14 Then discharged event 17 That seems like a coherent flow

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Event 3 28M Surgery Then doctor consultation event 6 for scheduled knee surgery Then surgery prep event 9 surgery performed event 13 recovery event 16 and discharged event 18 That makes sense for a surgical case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me check if all events are accounted for The total events are 18 Lets count Case1 5 events 1 4 7 12 15 Case2 7 events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Case3 6 events 3 6 9 13 16 18 Total 5 plus 7 plus 6 equals 18 Yes all events are covered

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now check the order and logic For Case1 Register Triage X ray Doctor consult Discharge That seems logical Case2 Register Triage Lab test requested Lab test completed Doctor consult Prescription Discharge Thats a standard ER visit for an infection Case3 Register in Surgery Doctor consultation Surgery prep Surgery performed Recovery Discharge This looks like an elective surgery case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: All events are grouped and the flows make sense The departments also align ER cases stay in ER related departments while the surgical case moves through Surgery and Recovery
